name: ChkStart_LINSchedTableViolation
title: ChkStart_LINSchedTableViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_LINSchedTableViolation (dword TableIndex, duration Jitter, char[] CaplCallback);
description: Checks a certain LIN schedule table for correspondence with the database definition.
An event will be generated, if

parameters.name: TableIndex
parameters.description: Zero based index of schedule table to be checked.

parameters.name: Jitter
parameters.description: Allowed deviation from the timing defined by schedule tables. For this value usually Master’s Jitter is used. Measured slot delay should be in the range: D - Jitter <= M <= D + Jitter; where M is measured delay and D is expected delay. Unit: Can be set with ChkConfig_SetPrecision.Default: Master’s Jitter defined in LDF.

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
